name: godot-mcp
description: Godot 4 MCP 集成插件，通过 AI 对话直接操作 Godot Editor。支持场景管理、节点操作、脚本编辑、项目运行等功能。
description_en: Godot 4 game development MCP integration. Enables AI to directly control the Godot Editor via MCP protocol for node creation, scene management, script editing, and full-stack game development assistance.
